ЩҲШҘЩ„Щү Ш¬Ш§ЩҶШЁ Ш§Щ„ЩӮШ¶Ш§ЩҠШ§ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШӯШ§Щ„Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Ш§Ш¬ШӘЩ…Ш§Ш№ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ЩҠЩӮШҜЩ…ЩҮШ§ Ш§Щ„ШЁШұЩҶШ§Щ…Ш¬Шӣ ШӘШұШөШҜ Ш№ШҜШіШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШұШ§ШіЩ„ЩҠЩҶ Щ…Ш¬Щ…ЩҲШ№Ш© Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЈШ®ШЁШ§Шұ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӘЩҶЩҲШ№Ш© ЩҲШ§Щ„ЩҒШұЩҠШҜШ© ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш¬Ш§Щ„Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Ш№Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ© ЩҲШ§Щ„ШӘЩғЩҶЩҲЩ„ЩҲШ¬ЩҠШ© ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш«ЩӮШ§ЩҒЩҠШ© ЩҲШ§Щ„ЩҒЩҶЩҠШ© ЩҲШ§Щ„ШіЩҠШ§ШіЩҠШ©ШҢ ЩҲШәЩҠШұЩҮШ§ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ЩӮШ¶Ш§ЩҠШ§ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш·ШұЩҲШӯШ© Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„ШіШ§ШӯШ© Ш§Щ„ШҘШ№Щ„Ш§Щ…ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№ШұШЁЩҠШ©. ЩҲШӘЩ…ЩҠШІ Ш§Щ„ШЁШұЩҶШ§Щ…Ш¬ Щ…ЩҶШ° Ш§ЩҶШ·Щ„Ш§ЩӮЩҮ ШЁШӘШұЩғЩҠШІЩҮ Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„ЩӮШ¶Ш§ЩҠШ§ Ш§Щ„Ш§Ш¬ШӘЩ…Ш§Ш№ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШӯШіШ§ШіШ© ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш¬ШӘЩ…Ш№ Ш§Щ„ШіШ№ЩҲШҜЩҠ ШЁЩҲШ¬ЩҮ Ш®Ш§ШөШҢ ЩҲШ§Щ„Щ…Ш¬ШӘЩ…Ш№ Ш§Щ„Ш№ШұШЁЩҠ Ш№Щ„Щү ЩҲШ¬ЩҮ Ш§Щ„Ш№Щ…ЩҲЩ…ШҢ ЩҒЩҠ Щ…ШӯШ§ЩҲЩ„Ш© Щ„ЩғШіШұ Ш§Щ„Ш·Ш§ШЁШ№ Ш§Щ„ШіШұШҜЩҠ Ш§Щ„Ш°ЩҠ ШӘШӘШіЩ… ШЁЩҮ Ш§Щ„ШЁШұШ§Щ…Ш¬ Ш§Щ„ШҘШ®ШЁШ§ШұЩҠШ©ШҢ ЩҲШӘШӯЩҲЩҠЩ„ЩҮШ§ ШҘЩ„Щү ЩӮШөШө ШҘЩҶШіШ§ЩҶЩҠШ© ШӘШҜШ№ЩҲ Щ„Щ„ШЈЩ…Щ„ШҢ ЩҲЩҠШІЩҠШҜЩҮШ§ ШЁШ§Щ„Ш¬Ш§ЩҶШЁ Ш§Щ„ШӘШӯЩ„ЩҠЩ„ЩҠ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӘШ®ШөШөШҢ ШЁШ§ШіШӘШ¶Ш§ЩҒШ© Щ…Ш¬Щ…ЩҲШ№Ш© Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Ш§Ш®ШӘШөШ§ШөЩҠЩҠЩҶ Ш§Щ„Ш№ШұШЁ ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠЩҠЩҶ ЩҒЩҠ ЩғШ§ЩҒШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш¬Ш§Щ„Ш§ШӘ. snippet.title: Dodge Challenger Demon v Porsche 911 Turbo S - DRAG RACE
snippet.description:
Need help buying your next car? Click https://www.carwow.co.uk/-help-me-carwow and my team and I will help you choose your ideal car at a fair price - from Mat Watson!
.............................................................

ItвҖҷs time for an almighty USA vs Germany drag race! 

MatвҖҷs in the absolutely huge Dodge Challenge Demon, and heвҖҷs lining up against Yianni in the Porsche 911 Turbo S! 

When you compare them on paper, it looks like the Dodge has it in the bag. With a humungous 6.2-litre supercharged V8 under its massive bonnet, the Challenge Demon can put down 808hp and 972Nm! As a result, it seemingly dwarfs the 911 Turbo S, which has a 3.8-litre twin-turbo flat-six, which can produce 650hp & 800Nm. 

But of course, this isnвҖҷt the first time weвҖҷve driven a Porsche 911 Turbo S on this channel, and we know youвҖҷre pretty much guaranteed a 1/4 mile time of less than 10.5 seconds! 

So how do you think this will play out? Will the Dodge be able to put its power down? Or is the Porsche set to grab another victory? 

YouвҖҷll have to keep watching to find out!

Thanks to CS Panda for lending us the Dodge - https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCxwBVsAoWWkQjKmSKOx5u2A

.............................................................

Ш№Щ„Щү ЩӮЩ„ШЁЩҠ ШӘШұШ§Щғ ШЈШЁШҜШ§
ЩҲШ№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ… ЩҲШ®Щ„ЩӮ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҮ
.. ШӘШ№ШҜЩ‘Ш§ Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ… ЩҲШ№ШҜЩ‘Ш§

ЩҲШ§ЩҶШ§ ЩҒЩҠ ЩҲШ¬ЩҮЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШҙШұЩҮЩҮ

snippet.description:

snippet.title: Hog Mountain Challenge Is On! (Clash Of Clans Lunar New Year Special)
snippet.description:
Do you have what it takes to conquer the mighty Golden Dragon and beat the Hog Mountain challenge? Earn 2 Builder Potions, Gems and Resources by scoring 3 stars in one attack during this Lunar New Year special event! 

Featuring: the Warrior King skin, the brand new Hog Mountain scenery, the Wall Breaker decoration, and the Lucky Shrub seasonal obstacle. Also a blast from the past: the Warrior Queen skin! 



Follow us on our Socials!
Twitter в–ә https://twitter.com/ClashofClans/
Instagram в–әhttps://www.instagram.com/clashofclans 
Facebook в–әhttps://www.facebook.com/ClashofClans 

Attack. Defend. Strategize. Download for free for mobile devices. http://supr.cl/ThisArmy

From rage-Вӯfilled Barbarians with glorious mustaches to pyromaniac wizards, raise your own army and lead your clan to victory! Build your village to fend off raiders, battle against millions of players worldwide, and forge a powerful clan with others to destroy enemy clans.
PLEASE NOTE! Clash of Clans is free to download and play, however some game items can also be purchased for real money 

Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash of Clans.
A network connection is also required.

FEATURES
- Build your village into an unbeatable fortress 
- Raise your own army of Barbarians, Archers, Hog Riders, Wizards, Dragons and other mighty fighters
- Battle with players worldwide and take their Trophies
- Join together with other players to form the ultimate Clan
- Fight against rival Clans in epic Clan Wars 
- Build 18 unique units with multiple levels of upgrades
- Discover your favorite attacking army from countless combinations of troops, spells, Heroes and Clan reinforcements 
- Defend your village with a multitude of Cannons, Towers, Mortars, Bombs, Traps and Walls
- Fight against the Goblin King in a campaign through the realm

Chief, are you having problems? Visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/clas...

http://www.supercell.net/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://www.supercell.net/terms-of-ser...

http://www.supercell.net/parents

Tomorrow is Chinese New YearвҖҷs Eve! 
We put up lanterns, paste Spring Festival couplets, and do shopping and stock up for the new year!
Another year is dawning!
Chinese New YearвҖҷs decorations, goods and snacks are ready for the big day.
Melon seeds, peanuts, candied haws, Sanzi (fried dough twists), and fried prawn crackers, to name a few.
A big hug for those who canвҖҷt get together with their families back in the hometown.
IвҖҷm convinced that infinite hope and luck
are sure to come in 2021!

zh-CN.title: Chinese New YearвҖҷs decorations, goods and snacksпјҒжҳҺж—ҘйҷӨеӨ•пјҢжҢӮзҒҜз¬јгҖҒиҙҙеҜ№иҒ”гҖҒеӨҮеҘҪе№ҙиҙ§иҝҮеӨ§е№ҙе•ҰпјҒдёЁLiziqi Channel
zh-CN.description:
Please  subscribe to гҖҗжқҺеӯҗжҹ’ Liziqi гҖ‘Liziqi Channel on YouTube if you like my videos: https://goo.gl/nkjpSx 
#жқҺеӯҗжҹ’#Liziqi#lГҪtб»ӯthбәҘ#ChineseCuisine #ChineseFood

Tomorrow is Chinese New YearвҖҷs Eve! 
We put up lanterns, paste Spring Festival couplets, and do shopping and stock up for the new year!
Another year is dawning!
Chinese New YearвҖҷs decorations, goods and snacks are ready for the big day.
Melon seeds, peanuts, candied haws, Sanzi (fried dough twists), and fried prawn crackers, to name a few.
A big hug for those who canвҖҷt get together with their families back in the hometown.
IвҖҷm convinced that infinite hope and luck
are sure to come in 2021!

snippet.description:
ШҙЩҲЩҒ ЩҠЩҲШіЩҒ ЩҲШіШ§ШұШ© ШЁЩҠЩҲШ§Ш¬ЩҮЩҲШ§ Ш§Щ„ШӯШұШ§Щ…ЩҠШ© ШҘШІШ§ЩҠ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҠ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„Ш№Щ…Ш§ШұШ©.. ШөШұЩҠШ® Ш¶ШӯЩғ#ЩҒЩҠ_ШЁЩҠШӘЩҶШ§_ШұЩҲШЁЩҲШӘ 

Ш¬ШІШЎ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӯЩ„ЩӮШ© Ш§Щ„ШұШ§ШЁШ№Ш© Ш№ШҙШұ Щ…ЩҶ Щ…ШіЩ„ШіЩ„ #ЩҒЩҠ_ШЁЩҠШӘЩҶШ§_ШұЩҲШЁЩҲШӘ
ШЁШ·ЩҲЩ„Ш© :  ШЁШ·ЩҲЩ„Ш© ШҙЩҠЩ…Ш§ШЎ ШіЩҠЩҒШҢ ЩҮШҙШ§Щ… Ш¬Щ…Ш§Щ„ШҢ Ш№Щ…ШұЩҲ ЩҲЩҮШЁШ©ШҢ ШҜЩ„Ш§Щ„ Ш№ШЁШҜ Ш§Щ„Ш№ШІЩҠШІШҢ Щ„ЩҠЩ„Щү ШЈШӯЩ…ШҜ ШІШ§ЩҮШұШҢ Щ„ЩҠЩ„Щү Ш№ШІ Ш§Щ„Ш№ШұШЁШҢ ЩҲШ№ШҜШҜ Щ…ЩҶ Ш¶ЩҠЩҲЩҒ Ш§Щ„ШҙШұЩҒ 
ЩҠШ№ШұШ¶ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіЩ„ШіЩ„ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҲШ§Ш№ЩҠШҜ Ш§Щ„ШӘШ§Щ„ЩҠШ©
 ШҢ.
ЩӮЩҶШ§Ш© cbc Ш№ШұШ¶ ШЈЩҲЩ„ 8 Щ…ШіШ§ШЎ
ШҘШ№Ш§ШҜШ© 2:30 ШөШЁШ§ШӯШ§ШҢ 12 ШёЩҮШұШ§

ШӘШҜЩҲШұ ШЈШӯШҜШ§Ш« Щ…ШіЩ„ШіЩ„ ШЁЩҠШӘЩҶШ§ ШұЩҲШЁЩҲШӘШҢ ШӯЩҲЩ„ ШЈШіШұШ© ШҙШ§ШЁШ© Щ…ЩғЩҲЩҶШ© Щ…ЩҶ ШІЩҲШ¬ ЩҲШІЩҲШ¬Ш© ЩҲЩҠШ№Щ…Щ„ Ш§Щ„ШІЩҲШ¬ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩғЩҶЩҲЩ„ЩҲШ¬ЩҠШ§ШҢ ЩҒЩҠЩӮЩҲЩ… ШЁШ§Ш®ШӘШұШ§Ш№ Ш№ШҜШҜ Щ…ЩҶ В«Ш§Щ„ШұЩҲШЁЩҲШӘВ»ШҢ ЩҲШӘЩӮШұШұ Ш§Щ„ШІЩҲШ¬Ш© Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ШӘШ¬ШіШҜ ШҜЩҲШұЩҮШ§ Щ„ЩҠЩ„Щү ШІШ§ЩҮШұ Ш§Щ„Ш§ШіШӘШ№Ш§ЩҶШ© ШЁШұЩҲШЁЩҲШӘ Щ„Щ„Ш№ЩҠШҙ Щ…Ш№ЩҮЩ… ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҶШІЩ„ШҢ ЩҠЩӮЩ„ШЁ ШӯЩҠШ§ШӘЩҮЩ… ШұШЈШіЩӢШ§ Ш№Щ„Щү Ш№ЩӮШЁ ЩҒЩҠ ШҘШ·Ш§Шұ ЩғЩҲЩ…ЩҠШҜЩҠ.
ШҙШ§ЩҮШҜ Щ…ЩӮШ§Ш·Ш№ Щ…ШіЩ„ШіЩ„ #ЩҒЩҠ_ШЁЩҠШӘЩҶШ§_ШұЩҲШЁЩҲШӘ:  


 #2021 #ШҙЩҠЩ…Ш§ШЎ_ШіЩҠЩҒ #ЩҒЩҠ_ШЁЩҠШӘЩҶШ§_ШұЩҲШЁЩҲШӘ

ШҘШ®ШұШ§Ш¬ : ЩҲЩ„ЩҠШҜ Ш§Щ„ШӯЩ„ЩҒШ§ЩҲЩҠ
ШҘЩҶШӘШ§Ш¬ : Synergy #Synergy ШӘШ§Щ…Шұ Щ…ШұШіЩҠ
ШҙШұЩғШ© ШіЩҠЩҶШұШ¬Щү Щ„Щ„Ш§ЩҶШӘШ§Ш¬ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩ„ЩҠЩҒШІЩҠЩҲЩҶЩү ЩҲШ§Щ„ШіЩҠЩҶЩ…Ш§ШҰЩү ЩҲШ®ШҜЩ…Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШҜШ№Ш§ЩҠШ© ЩҲШ§Щ„ШҘШ№Щ„Ш§ЩҶ ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш№Щ„Ш§ЩӮШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ…Ш©

snippet.title: Groove Mera | HBL PSL Official Anthem 2021 | Naseebo Lal, Aima Baig & Young Stunners | #HBLPSL6
snippet.description:
Groove Mera | HBL PSL Official Anthem 2021 | Naseebo Lal, Aima Baig & Young Stunners | #HBLPSL6

Groove with us to the official HBL PSL 6 anthem as we celebrate the moments of finesse that one finds in the heart of every cricket match. 

This yearвҖҷs anthem also reflects the realities of COVID-19. As a number of fans will be watching PakistanвҖҷs biggest sporting event remotely, the anthem cheers on players on the field and their fans at home to celebrate their groove!

The anthem is a celebration of PakistanвҖҷs musical diversity as Naseebo Lal, Aima Baig and Young Stunners come together to sing the HBL PSL anthem for the first time ever. The mix of artists is particularly exciting as it represents artists from opposite ends of PakistanвҖҷs musical spectrum. The anthem brings together voices from PakistanвҖҷs rich musical landscape: regional folk and urban sounds of pop and hip-hop.

Music Produced by Xulfi
Agency: Giraffe Pakistan
Composed by Xulfi and Adnan Dhool
Lyrics: Adnan Dhool, Young Stunners (Talha Younus, Talha Anjum)
Associate Music Producer: Bilal Haider
Executive Producer: Muhammad Ibrahim
Operations Manager: Saad Mansoor
Vocals: Naseebo Lal, Aima Baig, Young Stunners 
Recorded and Mixed by Xulfi @ Xth Harmonic
Mastered by Chris Gehringer @ Sterling Sound, Edgewater NJ.
Production House: Seeme Production 
Executive Producer: Shehzad Ahmed 
Producer: Madiha Majeed 
Director: Fida Moin
DOP: Zain Haleem 
Post Producer: Faisal Shaikh 
Edit: Ahsan Raza 
Grade: Tahir Moosa 
Post and animation: Owais Roy, Post Island

snippet.title: ШҙЩҲЩҒ ШІЩҲЩ…ШЁШ§ Ш№Щ…Щ„ШӘ ШҘЩҠЩҮ Щ…Ш№ Ш§Щ„ШӯШұШ§Щ…ЩҠЩҮ..ЩҲШҘШІШ§ЩҠ ШіШ§Ш№ШҜ Щ„Ш°ЩҠШ° ШіШ§ШұШ© ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ЩғЩҲШ§ЩҒЩҠШұ#ЩҒЩҠ_ШЁЩҠШӘЩҶШ§_ШұЩҲШЁЩҲШӘ
snippet.description:
ШҙЩҲЩҒ ШІЩҲЩ…ШЁШ§ Ш№Щ…Щ„ШӘ ШҘЩҠЩҮ Щ…Ш№ Ш§Щ„ШӯШұШ§Щ…ЩҠЩҮ..ЩҲШҘШІШ§ЩҠ ШіШ§Ш№ШҜ Щ„Ш°ЩҠШ° ШіШ§ШұШ© ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ЩғЩҲШ§ЩҒЩҠШұ#ЩҒЩҠ_ШЁЩҠШӘЩҶШ§_ШұЩҲШЁЩҲШӘ

Ш¬ШІШЎ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӯЩ„ЩӮШ© Ш§Щ„Ш«Ш§ЩҶЩҠШ© Ш№ШҙШұ Щ…ЩҶ Щ…ШіЩ„ШіЩ„ #ЩҒЩҠ_ШЁЩҠШӘЩҶШ§_ШұЩҲШЁЩҲШӘ
ШЁШ·ЩҲЩ„Ш© :  ШЁШ·ЩҲЩ„Ш© ШҙЩҠЩ…Ш§ШЎ ШіЩҠЩҒШҢ ЩҮШҙШ§Щ… Ш¬Щ…Ш§Щ„ШҢ Ш№Щ…ШұЩҲ ЩҲЩҮШЁШ©ШҢ ШҜЩ„Ш§Щ„ Ш№ШЁШҜ Ш§Щ„Ш№ШІЩҠШІШҢ Щ„ЩҠЩ„Щү ШЈШӯЩ…ШҜ ШІШ§ЩҮШұШҢ Щ„ЩҠЩ„Щү Ш№ШІ Ш§Щ„Ш№ШұШЁШҢ ЩҲШ№ШҜШҜ Щ…ЩҶ Ш¶ЩҠЩҲЩҒ Ш§Щ„ШҙШұЩҒ 
ЩҠШ№ШұШ¶ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіЩ„ШіЩ„ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҲШ§Ш№ЩҠШҜ Ш§Щ„ШӘШ§Щ„ЩҠШ©

ЩӮЩҶШ§Ш© cbc Ш№ШұШ¶ ШЈЩҲЩ„ 8 Щ…ШіШ§ШЎ
ШҘШ№Ш§ШҜШ© 2:30 ШөШЁШ§ШӯШ§ШҢ 12 ШёЩҮШұШ§
ЩӮЩҶШ§Ш© cbc ШҜШұШ§Щ…Ш§ 11Щ…ШіШ§ШЎ
ЩҲШҘШ№Ш§ШҜШ© 5 ШөШЁШ§ШӯШ§ШҢ ЩҲ2 ШёЩҮШұШ§
ШӘШҜЩҲШұ ШЈШӯШҜШ§Ш« Щ…ШіЩ„ШіЩ„ ШЁЩҠШӘЩҶШ§ ШұЩҲШЁЩҲШӘШҢ ШӯЩҲЩ„ ШЈШіШұШ© ШҙШ§ШЁШ© Щ…ЩғЩҲЩҶШ© Щ…ЩҶ ШІЩҲШ¬ ЩҲШІЩҲШ¬Ш© ЩҲЩҠШ№Щ…Щ„ Ш§Щ„ШІЩҲШ¬ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩғЩҶЩҲЩ„ЩҲШ¬ЩҠШ§ШҢ ЩҒЩҠЩӮЩҲЩ… ШЁШ§Ш®ШӘШұШ§Ш№ Ш№ШҜШҜ Щ…ЩҶ В«Ш§Щ„ШұЩҲШЁЩҲШӘВ»ШҢ ЩҲШӘЩӮШұШұ Ш§Щ„ШІЩҲШ¬Ш© Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ШӘШ¬ШіШҜ ШҜЩҲШұЩҮШ§ Щ„ЩҠЩ„Щү ШІШ§ЩҮШұ Ш§Щ„Ш§ШіШӘШ№Ш§ЩҶШ© ШЁШұЩҲШЁЩҲШӘ Щ„Щ„Ш№ЩҠШҙ Щ…Ш№ЩҮЩ… ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҶШІЩ„ШҢ ЩҠЩӮЩ„ШЁ ШӯЩҠШ§ШӘЩҮЩ… ШұШЈШіЩӢШ§ Ш№Щ„Щү Ш№ЩӮШЁ ЩҒЩҠ ШҘШ·Ш§Шұ ЩғЩҲЩ…ЩҠШҜЩҠ.
ШҙШ§ЩҮШҜ Щ…ЩӮШ§Ш·Ш№ Щ…ШіЩ„ШіЩ„ #ЩҒЩҠ_ШЁЩҠШӘЩҶШ§_ШұЩҲШЁЩҲШӘ:  

 #2021 #ШҙЩҠЩ…Ш§ШЎ_ШіЩҠЩҒ #ЩҒЩҠ_ШЁЩҠШӘЩҶШ§_ШұЩҲШЁЩҲШӘ
ШӘШЈЩ„ЩҠЩҒ : ШЈШӯЩ…ШҜ Щ…ШӯЩҠЩҠ ЩҲ Щ…ШӯЩ…ШҜ Щ…ШӯЩ…ШҜЩҠ 
ШҘШ®ШұШ§Ш¬ : ЩҲЩ„ЩҠШҜ Ш§Щ„ШӯЩ„ЩҒШ§ЩҲЩҠ
ШҘЩҶШӘШ§Ш¬ : Synergy #Synergy ШӘШ§Щ…Шұ Щ…ШұШіЩҠ
ШҙШұЩғШ© ШіЩҠЩҶШұШ¬Щү Щ„Щ„Ш§ЩҶШӘШ§Ш¬ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩ„ЩҠЩҒШІЩҠЩҲЩҶЩү ЩҲШ§Щ„ШіЩҠЩҶЩ…Ш§ШҰЩү ЩҲШ®ШҜЩ…Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШҜШ№Ш§ЩҠШ© ЩҲШ§Щ„ШҘШ№Щ„Ш§ЩҶ ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш№Щ„Ш§ЩӮШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ…Ш©

Ш§ШҙШӘШұЩғ ЩҒЩү Ш§Щ„ЩӮЩҶШ§Ш© Ш§Щ„ШұШіЩ…ЩҠШ© : http://bit.ly/Synergyofficial

snippet.title: I Spent 100 Hours Customizing The World's Largest PS5 ($70,000)
snippet.description:
I can't believe we spent 100 hours customizing the world's largest Playstation 5 and gave PS5's away to subscribers lol

Hope you enjoyed! Subscribe right now and you'll be a part of the giveaways! Thanks for watching :)

If you're not yet subscribed, I promise you won't regret subscribing! If you're already subscribed, I love you! вқӨпёҸ
Subscribe and you might be picked to be in my next video! It's free and it would genuinely make me super happy if you subscribed! рҹҘә

Subscribe to all our channels!
ZHC Crafts: @ZHC Crafts 
ZHC Shorts: @ZHC Shorts 
MsMunchie: @MsMunchie 

This PS5 is 10 feet tall (3 meters) weighs 500 pounds (227 kilograms) and cost me $70,000 in total! This playstation 5 is insane! We spent over 4 months putting together this video for you!

Follow my socials too!
Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/zhc
Twitter - https://twitter.com/zhc_yt
Facebook - https://www.facebook.com/ZHC/

If you scrolled till the end... i luv u рҹҘәвқӨпёҸ

snippet.title: ЩҒШ§Ш¬ШЈЩҶШ§ Ш§ЩҶШі ЩҲ Ш§ШөШ§Щ„Ш© ШЁШӯЩҒЩ„Ш© Ш§Щ„ЩЎЩЎ Щ…Щ„ЩҠЩҲЩҶ Щ…ШҙШӘШұЩғ рҹҺҒ ШөШҜЩ…ЩҶШ§ЩҮЩ… рҹҳұ
snippet.description:
Ш§Щ„ЩҠЩҲЩ… ЩғШЁШұШӘ Ш№Ш§ШҰЩ„Ш© Ш§ЩҶШі ЩҲ Ш§ШөШ§Щ„Ш© ЩҲ ЩӮШұШұЩҶШ§ ЩғШ§Щ„Ш№Ш§ШҰЩ„Ш© Ш§ЩҶ ЩҶЩҒШ§Ш¬ШЈЩҮЩ… ШЁШҙЩҠШҰ ШЁШіЩҠШ· Ш®Ш·Ш·ЩҶШ§ ЩҒЩҠ ЩҶЩҒШі Ш§Щ„ЩҠЩҲЩ… ЩҲ ШұШӯЩҶШ§ ЩҒЩҠ ЩғШ§Щ„ЩҠЩҒЩҲШұЩҶЩҠШ§ ШЁШ§Щ„ШӘШӯШҜЩҠШҜ Щ„ЩҲШі Ш§ЩҶШ¬Щ„ЩҠШі ЩҲ Ш№Щ…Щ„ЩҶШ§ Щ„ЩҮЩ… ЩҮШ°ЩҮ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҒШ§Ш¬ШЈШ© ЩӮШұЩҠШӘ ЩғЩ„ ШұШіШ§ШҰЩ„ЩғЩ… Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҠ Ш§ШӘЩӮЩҲЩ„ Ш§ШӯШӘЩҒЩ„ЩҲШ§ ШЁШ§Щ„ЩЎЩЎ Щ…Щ„ЩҠЩҲЩҶ ЩӮЩҲЩ„ЩҲШ§ Щ„ЩҠ Ш§ЩҠШҙ ШұШ§ЩҠЩғЩ… ШЁШ§Щ„ШӯЩҒЩ„Ш© Ш§Щ„ШөШәЩҠШұШ© Шҹ 

ЩҒЩҠ ЩҒЩҠШҜЩҠЩҲЩҮШ§ШӘ ШұЩҮЩҠШЁШ© Ш§ШӘШөЩҲШұШӘ Щ…Ш№ Ш§ЩҶШі ЩҲ Ш§ШөШ§Щ„Ш© ЩӮЩҲЩ„ЩҲШ§ Щ„ЩҠ ШҙЩҶЩҲ ЩҲШҜЩғЩ… Ш§ШӘШҙЩҲЩҒЩҲШ§ ЩҒЩҠ ЩғШ§Щ„ЩҠЩҒЩҲШұЩҶЩҠШ§ Ш§ЩҲ Щ„ЩҲШі Ш§ЩҶШ¬Щ„Ші Шҹ 

Ш§ШӘШұЩғЩҲШ§ ШӘШ№Щ„ЩҠЩӮШ§ШӘЩғЩ… ШӯШӘЩү Ш§Ш®ШӘШ§Шұ ЩғЩ… ШӘШ№Щ„ЩҠЩӮ ЩҲ Ш§Ш¶ЩҠЩҒЩҮ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩӮШ·Ш№ Ш§Щ„ЩӮШ§ШҜЩ… ЩӮШұШЁЩҶШ§ ЩҶЩҲШөЩ„ Щ§Щ Щ   Ш§Щ„ЩҒ Щ…ШҙШӘШұЩғ Ш§ШӯШЁЩғЩ…. 

Ш§Ш°Ш§ ЩғЩҶШӘ Щ…ШҙШӘШұЩғ Ш¬ШҜЩҠШҜ Ш§ЩғШӘШЁ Щ„ЩҠ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ЩғЩҲЩ…ЩҶШӘ.

snippet.title: Billie Eilish: The WorldвҖҷs A Little Blurry вҖ” Official Trailer #2 | Apple TV+
snippet.description:
Witness the incredible rise of Billie Eilish in "Billie Eilish: The WorldвҖҷs A Little BlurryвҖқ as she tours and records the album that changes her life. Watch on Apple TV+ February 26: https://apple.co/_BillieEilishDoc 

"Billie Eilish: The WorldвҖҷs A Little BlurryвҖқ tells the true coming-of-age story of the singer-songwriter and her rise to global superstardom. From award-winning filmmaker R.J. Cutler, the documentary offers a deeply intimate look at this extraordinary teenagerвҖҷs journey, at just seventeen years old, navigating life on the road, on stage, and at home with her family, while writing, recording and releasing her debut album вҖңWHEN WE ALL FALL ASLEEP, WHERE DO WE GO?вҖқ 

The documentary is from Apple Original Films, in association with Interscope Films, Darkroom, This Machine and Lighthouse Management & Media. Directed by R.J. Cutler and starring Billie Eilish, Finneas OвҖҷConnell, Maggie Baird, and Patrick OвҖҷConnell as themselves. 

Song:

snippet.title: Rogue Queen Takes It All (Clash Of Clans Season Challenges)
snippet.description:
It's an all new season of Season Challenges and Gold Pass full of exciting tasks, rewards, and perks! The all new Rogue Queen Hero Skin awaits you! 


Follow us on our Socials!
Twitter в–ә https://twitter.com/ClashofClans/
Instagram в–әhttps://www.instagram.com/clashofclans 
Facebook в–әhttps://www.facebook.com/ClashofClans 

Attack. Defend. Strategize. Download for free for mobile devices. http://supr.cl/ThisArmy

From rage-Вӯfilled Barbarians with glorious mustaches to pyromaniac wizards, raise your own army and lead your clan to victory! Build your village to fend off raiders, battle against millions of players worldwide, and forge a powerful clan with others to destroy enemy clans.
PLEASE NOTE! Clash of Clans is free to download and play, however some game items can also be purchased for real money 

Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash of Clans.
A network connection is also required.

FEATURES
- Build your village into an unbeatable fortress 
- Raise your own army of Barbarians, Archers, Hog Riders, Wizards, Dragons and other mighty fighters
- Battle with players worldwide and take their Trophies
- Join together with other players to form the ultimate Clan
- Fight against rival Clans in epic Clan Wars 
- Build 18 unique units with multiple levels of upgrades
- Discover your favorite attacking army from countless combinations of troops, spells, Heroes and Clan reinforcements 
- Defend your village with a multitude of Cannons, Towers, Mortars, Bombs, Traps and Walls
- Fight against the Goblin King in a campaign through the realm

Chief, are you having problems? Visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/clas...

Privacy Policy:
http://www.supercell.net/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://www.supercell.net/terms-of-ser...

ParentвҖҷs Guide:
http://www.supercell.net/parents

en.title: Rogue Queen Takes It All (Clash Of Clans Season Challenges)
en.description:
It's an all new season of Season Challenges and Gold Pass full of exciting tasks, rewards, and perks! The all new Rogue Queen Hero Skin awaits you! 


Follow us on our Socials!
Twitter в–ә https://twitter.com/ClashofClans/
Instagram в–әhttps://www.instagram.com/clashofclans 
Facebook в–әhttps://www.facebook.com/ClashofClans 

Attack. Defend. Strategize. Download for free for mobile devices. http://supr.cl/ThisArmy

From rage-Вӯfilled Barbarians with glorious mustaches to pyromaniac wizards, raise your own army and lead your clan to victory! Build your village to fend off raiders, battle against millions of players worldwide, and forge a powerful clan with others to destroy enemy clans.
PLEASE NOTE! Clash of Clans is free to download and play, however some game items can also be purchased for real money 

Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash of Clans.
A network connection is also required.

FEATURES
- Build your village into an unbeatable fortress 
- Raise your own army of Barbarians, Archers, Hog Riders, Wizards, Dragons and other mighty fighters
- Battle with players worldwide and take their Trophies
- Join together with other players to form the ultimate Clan
- Fight against rival Clans in epic Clan Wars 
- Build 18 unique units with multiple levels of upgrades
- Discover your favorite attacking army from countless combinations of troops, spells, Heroes and Clan reinforcements 
- Defend your village with a multitude of Cannons, Towers, Mortars, Bombs, Traps and Walls
- Fight against the Goblin King in a campaign through the realm

Chief, are you having problems? Visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/clas...

Privacy Policy:
http://www.supercell.net/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://www.supercell.net/terms-of-ser...

ParentвҖҷs Guide:
http://www.supercell.net/parents

snippet.title: Ш¬ШұШЁЩҶШ§ Ш§ШәШұШЁ Ш§ЩҶЩҲШ§Ш№ Ш§Щ„ЩғЩҲШұЩҶ ЩҒЩ„ЩҠЩғШі Щ…Ш№ Ш§ШөШ§Щ„Ш© ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ…ШұЩҠЩғШ§ рҹҳұ
snippet.description:
Ш§Щ„ЩҠЩҲЩ… ЩӮЩ…ЩҶШ§ ШЁШӘШ¬ШұШЁШ© Ш§ЩғЩ„ Ш§ШәШұШЁ Ш§ЩҶЩҲШ§Ш№ Ш§Щ„ЩғЩҲШұЩҶ ЩҒЩ„ЩҠЩғШі ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ…ШұЩҠЩғШ§ Щ…Ш№ Ш§ШөШ§Щ„Ш© Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш§Щ„Шӯ ШҢ Ш§ЩҠШҙ ШӘШӘЩҲЩӮШ№ЩҲШ§ Ш§ШӯЩ„Щү ЩғЩҲШұЩҶ ЩҒЩ„ЩғШі ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ…ШұЩҠЩғШ§ Шҹ ЩҲ Ш§ЩҠ ЩҶЩҲШ№ Ш®Ш§Ш·ШұЩғЩ… ШӘШ¬ШұШЁЩҲЩҮ Шҹ ЩҲШҜЩғЩ… ЩҶШ№Щ…Щ„ Ш¬ШІШЎ Ш«Ш§ЩҶЩҠ ЩҶШ¬ШұШЁ ЩҒЩҠЩҮ Ш§ЩҶЩҲШ§Ш№ Ш§ШәШұШЁ Шҹ 
ЩҲШ§ЩҠШҙ Ш§ШӘШіЩ…ЩҲШ§ Ш§Щ„ЩғЩҲШұЩҶ ЩҒЩ„ЩғШі Ш§ЩҲ Ш§Щ„ЩғЩҲШұЩҶЩҒЩ„ЩҠЩғШі cereal ЩҒЩҠ ШҜЩҲЩ„ШӘЩғЩ… Шҹ

ЩҠШ§Ш®ЩҠВ ШӘШұШ§ЩҶЩҠВ ШөШҜЩӮВ ШЁШ§Щ„ШӯЩҠЩ„В ЩҲЩ„ЩҮШ§ЩҶ

Ш°Щ„Щ‘ЩҠШӘВ Ш§Щ…В Ш§Щ„ШӯШ§Щ„В Ш·Ш§Щ„В Ш§ЩҶШӘШёШ§ШұЩҠ

ШӘШөШҜЩ…ЩҶЩҠВ ШЁЩ’ЩҮШ¬ШұЩғВ ЩҲЩ„Ш§В ШӯШіЩ‘В ШЁЩҖВ ШӯЩ’ШІШ§ЩҶ
Ш§ШөШЁШұВ ЩҲВ ЩҲШ§ШіЩҠВ Ш¶ЩҠЩӮВ ШЁШ§Щ„ЩҠВ В ЩҲШ§ШҜШ§ШұЩҠ

Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҠВ ЩҠШӯШ§ЩҲЩ„В ЩҠШЁШ№ШҜЩҗЩғВ Ш№ЩҶВ Щ…ШіШ§ШұЩҠ

ЩҠШ§В ЩҶШ§Ш№ШіВ Ш§Щ„Ш№ЩҠЩҶЩҠЩҶВ ЩҠШ§В ШІЩҮЩ’ШұВ Ш§Щ„Ш§ЩҲШ¬Ш§ЩҶ
Ш§ШҙЩғШұВ Ш¬Щ…Ш§Щ„ЩғВ ЩҲВ ШЁЩ’Ш¬Щ…Ш§Щ„ЩғВ ШЈЩ…Ш§ШұЩҠ

Ш°Щ„Щ‘ЩҠШӘВ Ш§Щ…В Ш§Щ„ШӯШ§Щ„В Ш·Ш§Щ„В Ш§ЩҶШӘШёШ§ШұЩҠ

вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”

ЩғЩ„Щ…Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Ш§ШәЩҶЩҠЩҮ:

ЩҠШ§ЩҲЩғШӘ
ШҙЩҲЩҒЩ„ЩҠ ШҜЩҶЩҠШ§ Ш№Щ„Щү ЪҜШҜЩҠ .. Ш§Щ…ШҙЩҠ ЩҲШ§ШіЩғЩҶ ШЁЩҠЩҮШ§ ЩҲШӯШҜЩҠ 
ШҙШ№ЩҶШҜЩҠ ШЁШ§ЩӮЩҠ ШЁЩҠЩҶ Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ… .. ЩҠШҙШӘЩҮЩҲЩҶ ШҜЩ…ЩҲШ№ Ш®ШҜЩҠ
 
Ш№ЩҲШҜ Щ„Щ…ШіЩ…ЩҠ Ш№Щ„Ш§ЩӮЩҮ .. ШҙШ§ШЁШ№ ШЁШёЩҠЩ…ЩҮ ЩҲЩҶЩҒШ§ЩӮЩҮ 
ЩғЩ„ ШәШҜШұ ШЁЩ„ЩғЩҲЩҶ ЩҒШ§ЩӮЩҮ.. ЩҲШ§ЩҶЩҠ ШөШ§ШЁШұЩ„ЩҮ ЩҲШЈШ№ШҜЩҠ
 
ЩҲШөЩ„ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШӯШ§Щ„ЩҮ ЩҠЩҲЩғШӘЩҠ .. ШЁЩҠЩҶ ЩҶШ§ШіЩҠ Ш¬ШұЩҲШӯ ШӯШөШӘЩҠ
ЩӮШөШӘЩҠ ШөШ№ШЁЩҮ ЩҮЩҲШ§ЩҠ ЩҲШ§Щ„Щ„ЩҮ .. ШҙШӯШ¬ЩҠ Ш§ЩҶЩҠ ШӘШЈШ°ЩҠ ЩӮШөШӘЩҠ 

Ш№ЩҲШҜ Щ„Щ…ШіЩ…ЩҠ Ш№Щ„Ш§ЩӮЩҮ .. ШҙШ§ШЁШ№ ШЁШёЩҠЩ…ЩҮ ЩҲЩҶЩҒШ§ЩӮЩҮ 
ЩғЩ„ ШәШҜШұ ШЁЩ„ЩғЩҲЩҶ ЩҒШ§ЩӮЩҮ .. ЩҲШ§ЩҶЩҠ ШөШ§ШЁШұЩ„ЩҮ ЩҲШЈШ№ШҜЩҠ 

Ш§ЩғШЁШұ ШәЩ„Ш· .. ЩӮЩ„ШЁЩҠ Ш§ШұШӘШЁШ·
ШЁЩ„Щ…Ш§ ЩҠШӯШі ШЁШұЩҲШӯЩҠ ..ШӯЩҠЩ„ЩҠ ЩҶЩҮШҜЩ…

snippet.title: Saiyaan Ji в–ә Yo Yo Honey Singh, Neha Kakkar|Nushrratt Bharuccha|  Lil G, Hommie D| Mihir G|Bhushan K
snippet.description:
Gulshan Kumar & T-Series presents Bhushan Kumar's "Saiyaan Ji"; a brand new song in the voice of вҖңYo Yo Honey SinghвҖқ & "Neha Kakkar" featuring Yo Yo Honey Singh & Nushrratt Bharuccha. The lyrics of the new song are penned by Yo Yo Honey Singh, Lil Golu, Hommie Dilliwala & music produced by Yo Yo Honey Singh. The video is directed by Mihir Gulati.
